channel.title: Python on Joe Berusch
channel.description: Recent content in Python on Joe Berusch

item.title: Colossal Quad Adventure
item.description: Colossal Quad Adventure (CQA) is a text-based game, inspired by Adventure and Ready Player One. The game was born out of a series of light-hearted pranks on my Networks & Distribute Systems professor and features him as the main character. CQA is my passion project, in collaboration with my friend, Zayne Khouja, and will hopefully be played by CS Dept. students & faculty alike. Like Ready Player One, CQA involves three keys, each with their own challenges, mirroring significant concepts all students learn within the UChicago CS major.
